speaker: Radosław Sikorski
text: Mass migration is not a left-wing project — it was sustained for decades by Republican businessmen wanting cheap Latin American labor — and the right to control borders is not inherently right-wing; what's untenable is open borders combined with a welfare state.
context: Cited the Polish/Czech border fence with Belarus as evidence migration control isn't an ideological monopoly.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
